programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack bets Janet and Terri that he can stay away from women for a week.

programme.desc: Jack and Terri think Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.desc: The queens fast forward 50 years to perform in old lady girl groups, singing about life, love, and growing old with your besties; actress and comedian Megan Stalter guest judges.

programme.desc: The queens get up close and personal with celebrities for TV's sketchiest newsmagazine, 50/50; the runway, category is Night Of 1000 Beyoncés; special guests Charo, Frankie Grande and Love Connie.

programme.desc: The queens perform stand-up comedy in pairs, but an odd number of queens causes for some drama; comic Ali Wong (Ali Wong: Baby Cobra) guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: "The Rusical" is set in the small town of West Bumtuck, where drag is outlawed, and an underground alliance forms to try and defeat the bigots; country musician Orville Peck guest judges.
